headline: Solstice Advanced Materials Declares Dividend of $0.075 per Common Share
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials (NASDAQ: SOLS), today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly dividend payment of seven and a half cents ($0.075) per share of the Company's common stock. The dividend will be payable on September 10, 2026, to shareowners of record as of the close of business on August 27, 2026.

headline: Solstice Advanced Materials to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 30, 2026
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials (NASDAQ: SOLS) ("Solstice" or "the Company") will issue its second quarter financial results before market open on July 30, 2026. The Company will also hold a conference call to discuss the results at 8:30 a.m. ET.
